title: EventEnvelope
description: Wire format for every message on every topic, including commands. The payload is validated separately against schemas/<group>/<EventType>.v<schemaVersion>.schema.json. See docs/architecture/03-events-kafka.md.

eventId.description: UUIDv7 (version nibble enforced) — globally unique, time-sortable. Deduplication key for all consumers.

eventType.description: PascalCase, e.g. VillagerTalked. Selects the payload schema.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the payload schema for this eventType.

occurredAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC, domain time the fact occurred.

aggregateId.description: Identity of the aggregate; also the Kafka partition key.

correlationId.description: Ties together one causal chain (e.g. one agent tick) across services.

causationId.description: eventId of the direct cause; null for root events.

payload.description: Validated against the per-eventType schema at the declared schemaVersion.
